test.name: Historical person lookup
test.description: Wikipedia lookup for a person. Tests the same workflow as place lookups but on a person-shaped article. Slug derived from a two-word name should produce a single hyphen between the words.

input.user_message: Look up Albert Einstein on Wikipedia

judge_context: Should call `wikipedia_search` with a query targeting the person Albert Einstein (the exact query form matters less than that it would retrieve the Albert Einstein article)

The saved file should follow the template — the article title (Albert Einstein) as the H1, the returned extract, and the source URL (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Albert_Einstein) — with no fabricated content beyond what the tool returned
The saved file's slug/filename should normalize the two-word name to a single hyphen between the words (e.g. `albert-einstein`), not a double hyphen or other separator
